title: After Enies Lobby: Turning Point
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #18 as the scene develops across pages 12–15.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Marine HQ Chief Petty Officer Coby

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I don't know you. Who are you?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The son of Captain Morgan, Helmetpo !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hey, hey, give me a break!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I STILL CAN'T FORGIVE THEM, COBY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Eeeh!!? How can you be so selfish?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I thought your Grandpa was a VIP.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I heard you met your dad.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, what? He didn't introduce himself...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Luffy's dad was in that town!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: monkey D. Dragon, the Revo- Lutionary.

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #11, Whitebeard, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: turning point.
